texto: I feel privileged and honored to have flown. It's been a tremendous ride, looking back on the legacy and accomplishments, like the Hubble telescope and the launching of the International Space Station in 1998.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alan G. Poindexter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I feel privileged and honored to have flown. It's been a tremendous ride, looking back on the leg…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, legacy, looking-back pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e looking-back.

frase_original: I feel privileged and honored to have flown. It's been a tremendous ride, looking back on the legacy and accomplishments, like the Hubble telescope and the launching of the International Space Station in 1998.

texto: I'm really hopeful about the future of space exploration and human spaceflight. Civilization as we know it has been defined by exploration. You know, we need to go off and find out what's around the next corner and what's just beyond what we already know. It's part of our being; it's part of our moral fiber to go off and explore.
